message:
Add NTM client integration and expand tool registry

- New NTM client package for tmux session management
- Extended setup service with NTM configuration
- Enhanced tool registry with dynamic tool discovery
- Updated beads issues tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-39ee","title":"Tests: NTM alerting rules (health, stuck, termination)","description":"Goal:
- Validate NTM alerting rules and metadata for health, stuck, and termination signals.

Scope:
- Simulate degraded health, is-working false, and termination causes.
